title: GARY LEIF NAVIGATION CENTER - 211info
text: UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK GARY LEIF NAVIGATION CENTER GARY LEIF NAVIGATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides day center and overnight sheltering services. Day center offers information and referral to community resources. 948 SE Mill Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 492-2135 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 492-2135 Main phone Main phone (541) 492-2135 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Day center: Walk in Overnight shelter: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: City of Roseburg Services: Community Shelters Homeless Drop In Centers Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
